description: skeft-qa loop-durability + egress hooks (v4.3): SessionStart re-inject (live-anchor) + PreToolUse(AskUserQuestion) guard + SessionEnd marker cleanup + PreCompact durable-channel staging (snapshot + lean regen flag; synchronous, no context injection) (default-inert, fail-open) + PreToolUse(WebSearch|WebFetch) web-egress guard (unconditional, fail-closed).

hooks.command: uv run --no-sync python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/harness_web_egress_guard.py" || printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"[web-egress] guard failed to launch; failing closed."}}'
